headline: TVET Enrollment Reaches 260,000 but Industry Uptake Lags
context: Technical and vocational education enrollment grew 15% in 2025 but employer surveys show low confidence in graduate skills.

cards.big: 260,000 TVET students enrolled across 1,200 institutions in 2025
cards.sub: Government targets 50% of post-secondary students in TVET by 2030

cards.big: Only 38% of TVET graduates find employment within 6 months of completion
cards.sub: Manufacturing sector absorbs most while services sector remains skeptical

cards.big: 7 different ministries and agencies oversee TVET programs nationally
cards.sub: Fragmented governance leads to duplicated courses and uneven standards

cards.big: Germany's dual-system TVET model achieves 85% placement within 3 months
cards.sub: Malaysia's industry-institution partnerships remain largely informal

cards.big: TVET expansion without employer co-design just creates more underemployed graduates
Should TVET institutions be required to guarantee apprenticeship placements
